topic: Mental Health & Clinical Psychology Anxiety & Depression Management: Evidence-based treatments and coping mechanisms. ADHD & Neurodiversity: Increased focus on adult ADHD diagnosis and management. Trauma & PTSD: Somatic therapy and novel treatments like Ketamine for trauma. Digital Wellness: Impact of social media on self-confidence, loneliness, and teen anger. Dovetail Dovetail +2 Social Psychology & Behavior Social Cognition & Bias: How prejudice, stereotypes, and cognitive biases affect behavior. Relationships & Attachment: Understanding romantic attachment styles and "ghosting" behavior. Influence & Persuasion: Social control, propaganda, and digital communication influences.
